title: Single crystal growth, chemical defects, magnetic and transport properties of antiferromagnetic topological insulators (Ge$_{1-δ-x}$Mn$_x$)$_2$Bi$_2$Te$_5$ ($x\leq 0.47$, $0.11 \leq δ\leq 0.20$)
type1_summary: No clear cleaned, figure-ready, or replot-ready dataset files were identified.

classification_notes: The paper-analysis text contains a mismatch between the stated paper title/abstract and the summary, which reduces confidence. Based on the file evidence alone, the deposit does not appear to contain identifiable dataset files.

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The provided paper-analysis text is internally inconsistent: it describes a paper on Ge-Bi-Te antiferromagnetic topological insulators, but the summary mentions Ni3In2S2 and weak anti-localization. No explicit data-availability statement or dataset description indicating raw or figure data was found.
file_classifications.file_evidence: Single PDF file from Zenodo, 1.4 MB. No tabular structure, sheet names, or machine-readable columns are available from the inspection report. As a PDF, it is more likely a paper or documentation file than a directly replot-ready dataset.
file_classifications.reasoning: Because the only available file is a PDF and there is no evidence of embedded figure-specific tables or raw instrument output, it cannot be classified as Type 1 or Type 2 dataset data with confidence. The safest classification is documentation.
file_classifications.ambiguity: High ambiguity: the file may be the paper itself or a supplementary document rather than a dataset file; no content inspection beyond metadata was provided.
file_classifications.key_columns_or_structure: Not available from inspection; PDF document only

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports crystal growth and magneto-transport measurements on Ni$_3$In$_2$S$_2$ single crystals, identifying weak anti-localization and topological-insulator-like behavior at low temperature.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper likely contains experimental crystal growth and magneto-transport measurement data, but no accessible dataset or supplementary/source data was identified from the available information.
